# Ferdinando Balzarro

Ferdinando Balzarro is an Italian karate teacher and writer based in Bologna.

## Main sections
- Home: https://ferdinandobalzarro.it/
- Books: https://ferdinandobalzarro.it/#libri
- Karate: https://ferdinandobalzarro.it/#karate
- Contacts: https://ferdinandobalzarro.it/#contatti

## Summary
This site presents Ferdinando Balzarro through writing, karate practice, and a personal philosophy centered on rigor, presence, and inner research.

## Contact
- Email: balzarro.nando@gmail.com
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/share/1DuhTeJWbM/
- City: Bologna
